name: Persimmon Cookies 1
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup shortening (butter or margarine work too)
1-3/4 to 2 cups flour (depending on how soft you want the
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream shortening and sugar until well combined.
2. Add egg and mix well.
3. Add persimmon pulp (it will be gelatinous with the soda mixed in) and dry ingredients, mixing until just combined.
4. Fold in dates and nuts.
5. Drop dough onto a greased cookie sheet using a spoon.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown and firm.
